job_summary: Applied Intuition, Inc. is a leader in physical AI, creating the digital infrastructure for intelligent machines. They are seeking a senior engineer to own and maintain their HD maps infrastructure, focusing on map storage formats, data pipelines, and collaborating with engineers and customers on future designs and features.
